headline: Microchip Technology (MCHP) Launches a New System-in-Package for Automotive Human-Machine Interfaces
summary: Microchip Technology Incorporated (NASDAQ:MCHP) is one of the High Growth Semiconductor Stocks to Buy. On March 24, Microchip Technology Incorporated (NASDAQ:MCHP) launched its AEC-Q100 Grade 2-qualified SAM9X75D5M System-in-Package (SiP), which is a hybrid Microcontroller Unit (MCU) for automotive Human-Machine Interfaces. The SiP has applications in digital cockpit clusters, smart clusters for two- and three-wheelers, HVAC […]
